steps.t: Cyneberg can be found outside of Lornsettle, looking out at the Isingmere. You should speak with Cyneberg.
A summoning horn for calling Cyneberg can be found at the west gate of Forlaw. You should go to the west gate when you are ready to depart and call Cy…
Cyneberg can be called by using your whistle. The cross-roads can be reached by following the road out of Forlaw into the Whitshaws. You should speak …
Cyneberg can be called by using your whistle. The cross-roads can be reached by following the road out of Forlaw into the Whitshaws. You should speak …
Cyneberg can be found at the cross-roads in the Whitshaws. You should speak with Cyneberg.
